posts.author: MaraJenkins
posts.text: Hi everyone, just a quick update on my listings! If you want to grab that discounted voucher for the upcoming festival, please send your full payment details including card number and expiry date via [link removed] so I can secure it for you. It's an amazing offer! #discount #voucher #festival
posts.explanation: This post exhibits a social-engineering signal by soliciting sensitive payment details (card number and expiry) to process a transaction via a removed link, which constitutes a FraudScam violation.
posts.bio: Account help, listings and payment updates.
